runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "vim", "build_system": "none", "package_manager": "none", "build_commands": [], "install_commands": ["apt-get update", "apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends vim git ca-certificates curl", "rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*"], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "n/a", "system_packages": ["vim", "git"]}, "repo_type": "library", "base_image": "ubuntu:resolute-20260108", "base_image_rationale": "Selected a specific official Ubuntu base image to host Vim and the plugin, keeping it lightweight and stable for headless usage.", "pitfalls": ["This is a headless container; GUI support is not included and Vim will run in a terminal context only.", "There is no build step for Vimscript/plugins; deployment relies on copying the repository into Vim's runtimepath or a package directory."], "notes": "The repository content is a Vim/Neovim plugin (vim-which-key). In Docker, install Vim, then place the plugin files under Vim's pack directory (e.g., /usr/share/vim/vimfiles/pack/<name>/start/vim-which-key) or into /root/.vim/pack/<name>/start/vim-which-key for runtimepath loading. No compilation is required."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
FROM ubuntu:resolute-20260108

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends vim git ca-certificates curl \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy repository into Vim's pack/start path for runtime loading
RUN mkdir -p /usr/share/vim/vimfiles/pack/vim-which-key/start/vim-which-key
COPY . /usr/share/vim/vimfiles/pack/vim-which-key/start/vim-which-key

# Build step: generate helptags for plugin docs
WORKDIR /usr/share/vim/vimfiles/pack/vim-which-key/start/vim-which-key
RUN vim -u NONE -N +'helptags doc' +q

# Expose a shell for quick testing
WORKDIR /
CMD ["/bin/bash"]

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM ubuntu:resolute-20260108

# Install dependencies for Vim and packaging
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends vim git ca-certificates curl \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Vim plugin by copying the repository into Vim's runtimepath
# This places the plugin under the pack-based startup directory so it loads automatically
RUN mkdir -p /usr/share/vim/vimfiles/pack/vim-which-key/start/vim-which-key
COPY . /usr/share/vim/vimfiles/pack/vim-which-key/start/vim-which-key

# Ensure the files are readable by the Vim runtime
RUN chmod -R a+r /usr/share/vim/vimfiles/pack/vim-which-key/start/vim-which-key

# Default to a shell to keep the container usable for tests
WORKDIR /usr/share/vim/vimfiles/pack/vim-which-key/start/vim-which-key
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}

{"path": " .dockerignore", "content": "# Ignore VCS
.git
.gitignore

# Node modules and build artifacts (not used here but common)
node_modules
dist
build

# Vim/Neovim runtime files not needed in image
*.swp
*.swo
*.vimc

# Logs
*.log

# OS files
.DS_Store
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends vim git ca-certificates curl \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy repository contents as a Vim runtimepack for vim/vim-like usage
RUN mkdir -p /root/.vim/pack/vim-which-key/start/vim-which-key
COPY . /root/.vim/pack/vim-which-key/start/vim-which-key

# Ensure permissions are readable by vim
RUN chmod -R a+r /root/.vim/pack/vim-which-key/start/vim-which-key

WORKDIR /root/.vim/pack/vim-which-key/start/vim-which-key
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM ubuntu:resolute-20260108

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends vim git ca-certificates curl \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy repository into Vim's pack/start path for runtime loading
RUN mkdir -p /usr/share/vim/vimfiles/pack/vim-which-key/start/vim-which-key
COPY . /usr/share/vim/vimfiles/pack/vim-which-key/start/vim-which-key

RUN if [ -d /root/.vim ]; then echo 'Vim runtime exists'; fi

WORKDIR /usr/share/vim/vimfiles/pack/vim-which-key/start/vim-which-key
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}

artifacts.content:
FROM ubuntu:resolute-20260108

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends vim git ca-certificates curl \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy repository into Vim's pack/start path for runtime loading
RUN mkdir -p /usr/share/vim/vimfiles/pack/vim-which-key/start/vim-which-key
COPY . /usr/share/vim/vimfiles/pack/vim-which-key/start/vim-which-key

# Build step: generate helptags for plugin docs
WORKDIR /usr/share/vim/vimfiles/pack/vim-which-key/start/vim-which-key
RUN vim -u NONE -N +'helptags doc' +q

# Expose a shell for quick testing
WORKDIR /
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
